analysis.name: CARV
analysis.summary: CARV是一个AI+游戏+基础设施项目，近期价格下跌但链上流动性极高，新闻面平淡，缺乏短期催化，建议观望。
catalysts: Binance Alpha空投活动（4月底）已过，无新催化
项目基本面尚可，但缺乏近期利好

latestNews.title: Binance Alpha Airdrop Explodes Today TAC RECALL and CARV Up for Grabs
latestNews.reason: 空投活动已结束，对当前价格无直接影响

fundamentals: CARV是AI Beings操作系统，支持自主AI代理
拥有CARV SVM链、D.A.T.A.框架、CARV ID/Agent ID系统
已发行800万+ CARV ID，6万+验证节点，1000+集成游戏
总供应量10亿，流通6.09亿，FDV约3800万美元
上线Binance、Bybit等CEX，但当前DEX流动性集中在Solana Orca
marketRead: DEX上CARV/USDC对流动性高达4578万美元，但24h交易量仅3.99美元，极度冷清
CEX价格0.03799美元，DEX价格0.1584美元，存在巨大价差，需警惕
ATH 1.36美元，当前跌去97%，处于深度熊市
risks: 价格持续下跌趋势，无反转信号
DEX与CEX价差异常，可能存在操纵或流动性分割
新闻面陈旧，缺乏近期催化
全稀释估值3800万美元，但流通市值仅2315万美元，解锁压力未知
合约风险：多链部署，需确认具体合约安全性
watchlist: 是否有新合作或上线交易所公告
sourceNotes: DEX价格与CEX价格差异大，可能数据有误或市场分割
新闻多为旧闻，缺乏近期有效信息

profile.name: CARV
profile.description: CARV is where Sovereign AI Beings live, learn, and evolve. What are AI Beings? They are sovereign intelligences born natively on-chain. AI Beings are designed with purpose, autonomy, and the capacity for growth. They possess memory, identity, and the ability to perceive and interact with their environment, not just to execute tasks, but to make independent decisions, adapt over time, and pursue self-defined goals. Anchored by its proprietary CARV SVM Chain, D.A.T.A. Framework, and CARV ID/Agent ID system (ERC-7231), CARV enables verifiable, consent-based AI Beings that learn, adapt, and co-create with users. Driven by CARV’s AI-first stack, consumer AI apps incubated through CARV Labs launched on Google Play, App Store and beyond, reaching billions of people, bringing agent-powered experiences and real-world incentives into mainstream digital life. With 8M+ CARV IDs issued, 60K+ verifier nodes, and 1,000+ integrated games, CARV bridges AI agents, Web3 infrastructure, and real-world utility, fueling the rise of agent-driven economies. At its core, $CARV token powers staking, governance, and coordination across this stack, making CARV the operating system for AI Beings on Web3.
